program: OneComputer Personal Connectors + M365 Native 95 Readiness Builder

readiness.resetReason: Terence customer-tested readiness reset: controlled-pilot score was too optimistic; customers want native Teams/Outlook plus safe personal third-party context.

currentPhase.name: Red-Team and Pilot Hardening
currentPhase.currentSubphase: P7.2 Pilot evidence pack and CISO scorecard closeout

phases.name: Roadmap reset and master plan
exitCriteria: Readiness reset from 95 controlled-demo to 30 customer-tested reality is documented
Roadmap places personal read-only third-party connectors before M365 native polish
Messaging app is demoted to internal/debug surface
Review gates and recurring runner are active

phases.name: Protective Guardrails Engine
exitCriteria: Action taxonomy covers email, file, secret, connector, runtime, policy, and external-share actions
Strictest-wins merge supports global cyber floor + personal stricter policy + agent mandate
Quota/threshold controls and negative-path tests exist
Policy simulator explains allow/block/step-up decisions
phases.currentSubphase: P1.3 Enforcement fixture pack and P1 closeout

subphases.name: Action taxonomy and strictest-wins guardrail engine
Guardrail simulator API and evidence preview
Enforcement fixture pack and P1 closeout

phases.name: Personal Read-Only Connector Broker
exitCriteria: Connector broker interface prevents credentials from entering agent runtime
Read-only connector grants support purpose, scope, TTL, quota, and revocation
Personal data retrieval returns filtered snippets with evidence, not raw unlimited dumps
User privacy console MVP shows connectors, active grants, data used, pause/revoke

phases.name: VTI Consent and Step-Up Approval
exitCriteria: Personal connector access maps to VTI/OpenVTC consent and step-up Trust Tasks
Approval proof is bound to purpose, connector, scope, TTL, and action digest
VTI unavailable fails closed for sensitive actions
No DIY crypto beyond adapter seams
phases.currentSubphase: P3.2 Step-up response and retrieval gate

phases.name: Microsoft 365 Agent Directory + Mailroom
exitCriteria: Agent Passport projects to Outlook/GAL contact or equivalent object
Agent email alias routes through Exchange/EOP/Defender to OneComputer Mailroom
Inbound email normalizes into Trust Task and passes guardrails before any action
Teams bot/message-extension path is specified or prototyped
phases.currentSubphase: P4.3 Mailroom evidence and revoked-route closeout

subphases.name: Agent Directory projection and mailroom contract
Directory/mailroom API preview and sample payload

phases.name: Golden Customer Workflows
exitCriteria: Legal MFA reviewer workflow demonstrates SharePoint read/copy/annotate/email approval
Executive briefing workflow demonstrates corporate + personal context with boundary controls
Unsafe actions are blocked before touching Graph/SharePoint/email/personal connectors

subphases.name: Legal MFA reviewer golden workflow contract
Executive briefing workflow with personal context boundary controls

phases.name: CISO and User Privacy Console
exitCriteria: CISO can inspect agent owner, mandate, connector classes, risk, approvals, evidence, revoke
User can inspect personal connectors, grants, exact data used, revoke/pause
Admin cannot casually read raw personal content; only metadata/risk/evidence unless incident process applies
Screenshots captured for frontend updates
phases.currentSubphase: P6.2 Screenshot-backed CISO/User Privacy Console UX

phases.name: Red-Team and Pilot Hardening
exitCriteria: Prompt injection from personal connector is blocked
Corporate-to-personal exfiltration attempts are blocked
Revoked connector cannot be accessed
Approval replay fails
Threat model, demo script, rollback plan, evidence pack, and CISO scorecard complete
phases.currentSubphase: P7.2 Pilot evidence pack and CISO scorecard closeout

subphases.name: Pilot evidence pack and CISO scorecard closeout

lastUpdate.summary: Scheduled simplified loop completed P7.2 pilot evidence pack and CISO scorecard closeout. Readiness moved to 95/100. Personal Connectors + M365 Native loop is complete for controlled pilot.
